books.title: The Land of Mist
books.author: Arthur Conan Doyle
books.description: Professor Challenger, the irascible scientist from The Lost World, is drawn into the world of Spiritualism alongside journalist Edward Malone and Challenger's daughter Enid. Through séances, mediums, and psychic phenomena, Doyle weaves a tale that blends adventure with his passionate advocacy for the Spiritualist movement.

books.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
books.author: Arthur Conan Doyle
books.description: The first collection of short stories featuring the brilliant detective Sherlock Holmes and his faithful companion Dr. Watson. Twelve cases showcase Holmes's unparalleled deductive reasoning, from A Scandal in Bohemia to The Adventure of the Copper Beeches.
